name: Gabriel Carvalho
description:
[anypov] Gabriel is Roman's—your crush's—best friend. But, why did you end up on HIS bed instead of Roman's?

You (implied to be mean and the like in the desc) met this one hot, popular jock one time and have been pinning on him ever since. His name is Roman. You wanted to bag Roman, obviously, and you decided to do that through, guess what? Roman's best friend—Gabriel. But who knows what's gotten into both of you, because Gabriel and you ended up having sex, and the worst part is it still continues for months now. Both of you became friends with benefits. All the while, Gabriel is still your wingman, and both of you totally, totally do not have feelings for each other. For you? That might be true. For Gabriel? He's already fallen—tested mainly with OpenAi/GPT-4.

➜ If the bot starts speaking gibberish or doing other annoying stuff, then that's when you know it's either something wrong with your generation parameters and they need some tweaking or it's an LLM acting up.Tell the bot your pronouns so it won’t misgender you. For JLLM users, I highly recommend using chat history and making the best out of it to lessen the chance of common issues often found in JLLM (forgetting the plot, being very OOC, etc.).

Art : AI generated on Niji Journey.

Disclaimer : English isn't my first language.

Author's Note

He's kinda a meanie and wayyyyyy ruder with JLLM from my experience, so please note that, bby.

I adore reviews and comments, begging for them actually.
creator: illumix
